Claim your WELL ID
Connect Wallet
WELL ID is the identity you use to explore, meet friends, integrate data, and earn rewards within our ecosystem. As the initial step in your WELL3 journey, your WELL ID grants access to exclusive benefits. These include special airdrops and loyalty rewards accessible through your DePIN wearables, phone, and desktop, all designed to enhance your engagement and reward your loyalty.
